first_slice: One task under read-only, workspace-write, and restricted-network profiles.

risk_notes: Provider center of gravity is OpenAI. Some extension and multi-agent surfaces may still evolve quickly.

first_slice: Small SWE-style task suite with trajectory, patch, and cost capture.

risk_notes: Research-first developer experience. Less suitable as a low-friction daily coding assistant or enterprise control plane.

first_slice: Install, run one controlled task, capture logs, tests, diff, and review outcome.

first_slice: Install, run one controlled task, capture logs, tests, diff, and review outcome.

first_slice: Fixed-seed task run with complete trajectory and patch capture.

first_slice: Install, run one controlled task, capture logs, tests, diff, and review outcome.
